title: Bulk Baked Chicken Thighs and Roasted Vegetables
description: Oven-baked chicken thighs with roasted vegetables, ideal for batch cooking and flexible meal reuse.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Toss potatoes, carrots, and onions with olive oil and half the seasoning.
Spread vegetables on a large baking sheet.
Season chicken with remaining spices and place on top of vegetables.
Bake for 45–50 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
Let cool slightly and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat in oven at 350°F or microwave until warmed through.

batch_notes: Roast everything on one sheet pan for efficiency.
Chicken and vegetables can be stored together or separately.

title: Bulk Turkey and Rice Skillet
description: Lean ground turkey cooked with rice and vegetables, perfect for meal prep and multiple meal variations.
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Heat oil in a large skillet and sauté onion and peppers.
Add garlic and cook briefly.
Add ground turkey and cook until browned.
Season with salt and pepper.
Mix in cooked rice and stir well.
Portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Microwave with a splash of water or heat in skillet until warmed.

batch_notes: Cook rice and turkey in parallel to save time.
This base can be portioned for multiple meals.

title: Bulk Pasta with Meat Sauce
description: Classic pasta with hearty meat sauce, ideal for large-batch cooking and freezer-friendly storage.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Heat oil and sauté onion until soft.
Add garlic and cook briefly.
Add ground beef and cook until browned.
Stir in marinara sauce and simmer 15 minutes.
Combine pasta with sauce or keep separate.
Portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Microwave or reheat on stove with a splash of water.

batch_notes: Make sauce in bulk and pair with fresh pasta as needed.

title: Bulk Egg and Potato Breakfast Hash
description: Simple breakfast hash with eggs and potatoes, suitable for batch cooking and reheating.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet.
Cook potatoes until tender and slightly crispy.
Add onion and peppers, cook until softened.
Whisk eggs and pour into skillet.
Stir until eggs are cooked through.
Season and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Microwave in short intervals, stirring occasionally.

batch_notes: Cook potatoes first to ensure proper texture.
Eggs can be added at the end to avoid overcooking.

title: Bulk Lentil and Vegetable Stew
description: A budget-friendly, protein-rich lentil stew that stores well and can be used across multiple meals.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot.
Add onion, carrots, and celery, cook until softened.
Add garlic and cook briefly.
Add lentils, tomatoes, and water.
Simmer for 40–50 minutes until lentils are tender.
Season and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat on stove or microwave, adding water if needed.

batch_notes: Cook a large pot and divide into portions.
Freezes very well for long-term storage.
